name: Prey of the Night
short_description: Become a night owl, soaring through an infinite forest under the moonlit sky. Skillfully avoid obstacles, hunt for prey to gain strength, and perch to regain stamina. But beware—every moment in the shadows tests your survival. How long can you conquer the night?
detailed_description:
Prey of the Night is an endless runner! Become a night owl, soaring through an infinite forest under the moonlit sky. Skillfully avoid obstacles, hunt for prey to gain strength, and perch to regain stamina. But beware—every moment in the shadows tests your survival. How long can you conquer the night?

Standard Mode:
Rack up as many points as possible without touching the ground. Prey and branches become more scarce as you fly forward.

Timed Mode:

Get as many points as possible before your time runs out.

Key Features:

  • Two Gamemodes

  • Engaging Powerups

  • Easy-to-Learn Controls

  • Customizable Key Binds

  • Keyboard and Mouse, Keyboard Only

  • Personal Statistics (Recent, Highscore, Total)

  • Two Separate Leaderboards for Each Gamemode

  • 20+ Achievements
